//: Personalized Marriage Overhaul content for Stardew Valley Expanded's marriage candidates. Dialogue voiced to match each character's SVE marriage dialogue. English only; content shown verbatim. Gift tastes are left to SVE - this pack only flavors dialogue, behavior, and forage loot.

VeryLow: Oh... um, good morning. I'm not really okay today. I'll just be at the vineyard.
Morning. I didn't sleep. Please don't worry about me... I'll be fine. I always am.
...Hi. Sorry. I don't have many words today.
Good morning. I'll stay out of your way. I don't want to be a bother.
Low: Good morning. The grapes need me, so I'll be out among the vines today.
Oh, morning! There's tea... I made too much again. Help yourself?
Morning. I stayed up way too late watching my shows. Worth it, though.
Good morning. I'm going to go check the casks downstairs. They're almost ready!
High: Hey, you! The vineyard's looking so good this morning. Come see it with me later?
Good morning! Um... I drew us as a pair of anime heroes last night. Is that weird? I think it's cute.
There you are! Everything's brighter when you're up. The vines AND me. Hehe.
Good morning! I saved you a sweet roll. Don't tell anyone I spoil you. ...Okay, you can tell.
VeryHigh: Good morning, you! I get to wake up next to you every day and it still makes me go 'YAY!' inside. Silly? I don't care.
Morning! I dreamed we were at a convention in matching costumes, holding hands. I woke up grinning like a goof.
There you are! This vineyard used to feel so big and empty. Now it's home, because you're in it. I love you so much.
Um — before you go — can I have a hug? ...Maybe two? I missed you even while you were sleeping. Extra cuddles tonight, okay?

Happy: Good morning! I'm SO happy today — the vines are thriving and you're here. Everything's perfect. YAY!
Morning! I finished a whole sketchbook page before sunrise. I'm buzzing! ...quietly buzzing.
Hi! Today feels gentle and bright, like the opening of a really good anime. And you're my favorite character.
Neutral: Morning. I'll be pruning the vines if you need me. It's peaceful out there.
I had ramen for breakfast again. Don't judge me! ...Okay, judge a little. It's fair.
The casks are doing their slow, quiet magic downstairs. I love that this place keeps making something beautiful.
Grumpy: Morning... I'm feeling small today. It's not you. Some days are just heavy. Sorry.
I didn't sleep, and my head's all fuzzy and sad. Be patient with me? Please?
...Hi. One of those quiet days where I feel kind of invisible. I'll be okay. I think.

Arguments.Intro: You walked past the vineyard again without stopping. I know it's silly, but... I watch for you every day. And today you didn't come.
Arguments.GoodChoice: I'm sorry. I'll always stop by — I promise.
Arguments.GoodReply: ...Really? You mean it? Okay! Okay. I'll have tea ready. ...And maybe a hug.
Arguments.NeutralChoice: I've just been busy on the farm.
Arguments.NeutralReply: I know. Busy is okay. Forgetting me isn't, quite. ...Sorry.
Arguments.BadReply: ...Oh. It's my whole world. And I thought you were part of it. ...Never mind.

Arguments.Intro: You laughed at my cosplay. I worked on it for weeks. I felt so stupid standing there.
Arguments.GoodChoice: It's incredible — show me how you made it!
Arguments.GoodReply: You... you really want to know? YAY! Okay, sit down, I'll tell you EVERYTHING.
Arguments.NeutralReply: It felt like it. But... okay. I believe you. ...Mostly.
Arguments.BadChoice: Aren't you a little old for costumes?
Arguments.BadReply: ...Oh. I see. I'll just... keep that part of me hidden, then.

Anniversary.Reminder: Um, hi,^I know you're busy, but... today's our anniversary! I'll be at the vineyard, hoping. No pressure! ...Okay, maybe a tiny bit of pressure.^- Sophia
Anniversary.Sweet: You remembered! Oh, I was so nervous you'd forget. This is the best day. YAY! Thank you for choosing me, again and again.
Anniversary.Disappointed: You forgot our anniversary. ...It's okay. I'm used to being forgotten... I just hoped at least someone would remember...

Lines: I saw you give someone a gift today. I'm not mad, just... I get scared I'm not enough. Sorry. I'm being silly.
You gave them a present? Oh... okay. I'll be okay. I just... wish it had been me.

Makeup.Hint: If you want to make it up to me... bring me something sweet? I have the biggest sweet tooth. You know that. Hehe.
Makeup.Reconcile: Something sweet, just for me? ...You always know. Okay! We're okay. Come here, you.
Makeup.Resigned: The apology never came... that's okay. I'm not very good at staying upset anyway.

Loot.JackpotReaction: Um — I found this between the vines and I actually squeaked out loud! It glows like something straight out of my comics! I'm too nervous to keep it... here, it should be yours. YAY!

VeryLow: Oh. Good morning. I have an early bus to catch. I should go.
Morning. I didn't sleep well. I'd rather keep to myself today, if that's alright.
...Hello. Forgive me. I'm not very good company this morning.
Good morning. I'll be quiet and out of the way. Don't mind me.
Low: Good morning. I've a shift at JojaMart. The bus waits for no one, sadly.
Morning. There's tea steeping, if you'd like a cup before the day starts.
Oh, good morning. I was up late with a novel again. I couldn't put it down.
Good morning. I'll be home after my shift. Same as always.
High: Good morning. What a lovely view of the farm. ...And a lovely face to wake up to. Hehe.
Morning! I dreamed about that little cafe again. With you there, it almost feels real.
There you are. You make even a long Joja shift feel bearable. That's a rare gift, you know.
Good morning. Dance with me later? Just here, in the kitchen. No one has to see but us.
VeryHigh: Good morning, my love. I used to dream of a grander life. It turned out to be a quiet one, with you — and it's everything.
Morning. I wrote you into the story I've been scribbling. You're the chapter where it all comes right. Hehe...
There you are. Waking beside you is lovelier than any film I've ever cried over. And I've cried over a lot.
Come here before you go. One kiss to carry through the day. ...That one was for me, really.

Happy: Good morning! I'm in a wonderful mood — a finished novel, perfect tea, and you. The little joys, you know?
Morning! I caught myself humming on the way downstairs. That's your doing, I think.
Hello! Today feels full of possibility. Like the first page of something good.
Neutral: Morning. I'll be behind the counter all day. At least I get to people-watch.
I rewatched my favorite film last night. Cried at the ending. Again. Worth every tear.
There's day-old pastry, if you'd like it. ...I may have rescued it from the bin. Don't tell.
Grumpy: Morning. A long shift looms and I'm already weary of it. Sorry. I'll brighten up.
...Hello. Feeling rather invisible today. It passes. It always passes.
Forgive me, I'm out of sorts. Retail does that to a person. Be gentle with me?

Arguments.Intro: You said you'd visit me on my break, and you didn't come. I stood by the window the whole time, watching the door. It was rather humiliating.
Arguments.GoodChoice: I'm so sorry. Next time I'll be there, first in line.
Arguments.GoodReply: ...You mean that? Then it's forgiven. That window won't feel so lonely. Thank you.
Arguments.NeutralChoice: Something came up on the farm.
Arguments.NeutralReply: Something always does. I understand. ...I only hoped.
Arguments.BadReply: It's the part of my day I look forward to most. ...But never mind. I'll get back to my register.

Arguments.Intro: You teased my dream of the cafe again. I know it sounds foolish, but it's the thing that gets me through every shift.
Arguments.GoodChoice: It's not foolish. Let's make it real, together.
Arguments.GoodReply: ...Together? Oh. Now you've gone and made me misty. Happy misty. Thank you.
Arguments.NeutralChoice: I didn't mean anything by it.
Arguments.NeutralReply: I know. Only... be gentle with that one. It's fragile.
Arguments.BadChoice: You'll never leave Joja, be realistic.
Arguments.BadReply: ...Realistic. Yes. Thank you for that. I'd better get back to the register.

Anniversary.Reminder: Hello,^I don't wish to make a fuss, but... today is our anniversary. I'll be thinking of it all through my shift, hoping you are too.^- Claire
Anniversary.Sweet: You remembered. Oh, I'm so relieved. You make me feel like I matter — and that is the loveliest gift of all. Thank you, truly.
Anniversary.Disappointed: You forgot our anniversary. ...It's quite alright. I've had practice pretending things don't sting. ...A great deal of practice.

Lines: I saw you give someone a gift. I trust you, I do. I only... worry that I'm easy to overlook.
You bought them a present? Oh. ...No, it's fine. I'm being silly. Forget I said anything.

Makeup.Hint: If you'd like to make it right... bring me something sweet. A pastry, a little treat. It always mends me.
Makeup.Reconcile: Something sweet? For me? ...You remembered what I like. We're alright now. Thank you. Hehe.
Makeup.Resigned: The apology never came. That's alright. I've grown used to letting small hurts go quiet.

Loot.JackpotReaction: I found this on the bus stop bench, of all places. It catches the light like a film reel mid-scene. I can't possibly keep something so lovely — here, it's yours.

VeryLow: Oh. You're up. I haven't the energy for pleasantries this morning, honey. Forgive me.
Morning. I slept poorly and I'm certain I look it. Let's not linger.
...Good morning. I'd rather sit with my coffee and my thoughts a while.
Mm. Morning, sweetie. I'm simply not myself today. Do give me some room.
Low: Good morning, honey. I think I'll paint today — something to occupy these restless hands.
Morning. There's a fresh pot on. The good cups, naturally.
Oh, you're awake, sweetie. I was just deciding which dress suits my mood. Indecision, mostly.
Good morning. I may call on Victor today. He pretends to mind. He doesn't. Hehe.
High: Good morning, honey! What a lovely day to be alive and in love. Join me for coffee?
Morning, sweetie! I poured us each a glass for later — a crisp white. Don't give me that look; it pairs with romance.
There you are, my dear. You bring a sparkle to this farmhouse that even I couldn't buy back in the city.
Good morning. I was just thinking how dreadfully lucky I am to wake to your face, honey.
VeryHigh: Good morning, my love. I've dined in glittering cities across the world, and none of it compares to waking beside you. None.
Morning, sweetie! I dreamed we danced somewhere grand. But I'd trade every ballroom for this quiet farmhouse, with you.
There you are, my heart. Come, let me look at you. ...Yes. Still the finest thing these well-traveled eyes have ever seen.
A kiss before you go, honey. Humor an incurable romantic. ...I may not be young, but I am hopelessly, completely yours.

Happy: Good morning, honey! I'm in a marvelous mood. The light is flattering, the wine is breathing, and you are here. Bliss.
Morning, sweetie! I feel positively radiant today. Do bask in it while it lasts.
Oh, what a glorious morning! Everything is lovelier when one is this happy — and you, my love, are precisely why.
Neutral: Morning, honey. I'll be at my easel today, chasing the light. Come distract me whenever you like.
I tried a new cake recipe last night. A triumph, if I do say so. And I do.
The farmhouse is so peaceful in the morning. I do love a little luxury and a great deal of quiet.
Grumpy: Morning. I'm in a mood, honey, and not a charming one. Tread lightly, would you?
...Good morning. My nerves are frayed and my patience thinner. Forgive me, sweetie.
Mm. Victor and I quarreled again. Mothers and sons, honestly. Don't mind my temper today.

Arguments.Intro: You've left me to dine alone every evening, honey. I gave up a glittering city life for the countryside — not to be lonely in it.
Arguments.GoodChoice: You're right. Tonight is yours — wine, candles, all of it.
Arguments.GoodReply: Now THAT is the spouse I married. I'll wear the good dress. Don't keep me waiting, darling.
Arguments.NeutralReply: Work, work. Even diamonds need polishing, honey. Don't forget me in the rough.
Arguments.BadChoice: Maybe drink a little less and notice more.
Arguments.BadReply: ...Oh. That was beneath you, sweetie. And it cut deeper than you know.

Arguments.Intro: You took Victor's side again, honey. I am his mother. Everything I do, I do because I want what's best for him.
Arguments.GoodChoice: You love him fiercely. Let's help him together.
Arguments.GoodReply: ...Together. Yes. I do get carried away, don't I. Thank you for steadying me, my love.
Arguments.NeutralReply: He'll always be my boy. ...But perhaps I do hold a touch too tight.
Arguments.BadReply: Smothering. What a word to throw at a mother. ...I think I'll retire early tonight.

Anniversary.Reminder: My darling,^Surely you know what today is. Our anniversary! I do expect to be swept off my feet — I've set the bar high, now clear it.^- Olivia
Anniversary.Sweet: You remembered, you wonderful creature! Of course you did. Come here — tonight we celebrate in style. You've earned a toast and a great many kisses.
Anniversary.Disappointed: You forgot our anniversary. ...I dressed for nothing, honey. Do you know how rare it is for me to feel foolish? I don't care for it one bit.

Lines: I hear you've been giving gifts about town, honey. I am not the jealous sort. ...I am, a little. Don't test it, sweetie.
A present, for someone else? How generous of you. I do hope they appreciate what I would never share lightly — you.

Makeup.Hint: If you wish to be forgiven, honey — something sweet. A cake, a confection. I am wonderfully easy to bribe, you'll find.
Makeup.Reconcile: Something sweet, for me? ...Oh, you do know the way to my heart, sweetie. All is forgiven. Come, sit with me.
Makeup.Resigned: The apology never arrived. No matter. I am far too fabulous to hold a grudge, honey. ...Mostly.

Loot.JackpotReaction: Honey, look at this! I've owned jewels that didn't sparkle half so brightly. It changes color as I turn it — utterly divine. I simply must give it to you; it deserves someone precious.

VeryLow: Morning. I've a great deal of reading to do. I'd rather not be disturbed, honestly.
Oh. You're awake. I'm not in a sociable frame of mind. My apologies, honey.
...Morning. I didn't rest well. Let's keep this brief.
Good morning. I'll be buried in my books. Best leave me to it.
Low: Good morning. I'm halfway through a rather dense text. Don't mind me, honey.
Morning. There's coffee. I calibrated it precisely, unlike a certain someone.
Oh, morning. The lads and I were up far too late gaming. I regret nothing. ...Some things.
Good morning. I've blueprints to sketch today. An engineer's work is never quite finished.
High: Good morning, honey! I read a passage last night that made me think of you. I, ah, dog-eared the page.
Morning! I beat Sam at a game last night and I fully intend to be insufferable about it all day. Join me?
There you are. You make this farmhouse far more interesting than any book — and I own a great many books.
Good morning. I sketched a little contraption for the kitchen, to make your mornings easier. ...Don't make it weird, honey.
VeryHigh: Good morning, my love. My mother crossed oceans chasing adventure. I found mine right here, with you. I wouldn't trade it for any horizon.
Morning, honey! Watching you stir awake — it makes me feel like everything I've ever done led right to this. I love you so much.
There you are. I'm a careful man with my words, so hear this one plainly: I adore you. Completely. ...And that's the unedited version.
Come here before you go. A kiss measurably improves my focus — I've tested it, repeatedly. Indulge the engineer, honey.

Happy: Good morning, honey! Excellent spirits today — a good book, good coffee, and you. The optimal trifecta.
Morning! I solved a problem that's vexed me for weeks, right as I woke. Today's going to be brilliant.
Good morning! I feel sharp and rather cheerful, which is rare for me before noon. You may take the credit.
Neutral: Morning. I'll be reading, and likely arguing with Sebastian online. The usual, honey.
We should visit Alex's ice cream stand soon. I could go for mint chocolate chip. ...A scholar needs fuel.
There's a fascinating chapter on ancient cultivation I'd love to bore you with later. Fair warning, honey.
Grumpy: Morning. My patience is in short supply today. Best not to test the hypothesis, honey.
...Hello. I'm out of sorts and overcaffeinated. A poor combination. Bear with me.
Mother and I quarreled. Again. I'm not fit company this morning, I'm afraid.

Arguments.Intro: You called my work 'just books' last night, honey. I graduated top of my class. It isn't nothing to me.
Arguments.GoodChoice: I'm sorry. Your mind is one of my favorite things about you.
Arguments.GoodReply: ...Oh. That's — well. That's a far better argument than mine. I concede, gladly. Thank you, honey.
Arguments.NeutralChoice: I didn't mean it like that.
Arguments.NeutralReply: Perhaps not. But words have precision, honey. Do mind yours.
Arguments.BadChoice: Books won't fix a fence, Victor.
Arguments.BadReply: No. But they built the mind that could design a better one. ...Forget it.

Arguments.Intro: You keep pushing me to travel like my mother. I'm happiest with a book and a quiet room, honey. Why is that never enough for anyone?
Arguments.GoodChoice: It's enough for me. Stay exactly as you are.
Arguments.GoodReply: ...You mean that. Do you know how rarely anyone says that to me? Thank you, honey. Truly.
Arguments.NeutralChoice: I only want to share the world with you.
Arguments.NeutralReply: I know. My world is smaller, and just as full. Will you meet me in it?
Arguments.BadChoice: You're wasting your potential hiding inside.
Arguments.BadReply: Hiding. ...You sound exactly like her. I'm going back to my room.

Anniversary.Reminder: My dear,^In the interest of full disclosure: today is our anniversary. I have, perhaps, overprepared. Do not disappoint the data, honey.^- Victor
Anniversary.Sweet: You remembered. I calculated a fair probability that you would, and I'm delighted to be proven right. Best year on record. Come here, honey.
Anniversary.Disappointed: You forgot our anniversary. ...I had it noted weeks in advance. I know sentiment isn't 'logical,' but I'm hurt all the same.

Lines: I'm given to understand you've been distributing gifts about town. I'm not insecure. I've simply... noted it, honey.
A present for someone else? I see. I shan't make a scene. I'll merely brood about it. Intellectually.

Makeup.Hint: If you'd like to mend this — make me something, honey. A proper home-cooked meal. Even ramen. Effort speaks louder than coin.
Makeup.Reconcile: You made this? For me? ...Well. The variables have shifted entirely. Apology accepted, warmly. Sit, eat with me, honey.
Makeup.Resigned: The apology never came. I've recalculated and chosen to let it go. Grudges are an inefficient use of one's mind.

Loot.JackpotReaction: Fascinating. I found this lodged in the riverbank — it refracts light in a way I genuinely cannot explain, and I can explain most things. It belongs with you, honey; consider it a data point in our favor.

VeryLow: I'm... not in the mood to talk this morning. It will pass. Forgive me.
Morning. The aether is turbulent today, and my temper with it. Best give me room.
...You're awake. My mind is elsewhere — tangled in things I'd rather not speak of. Later, perhaps.
A grey sort of morning. I'd weather it alone, if you don't mind.
Low: Good morning. I've an old text to decipher. Mind the runes, won't you.
Morning. I must check my tower's garden today. I trust you'll tend to things here.
There's coffee — strong, with a touch of Gotoran almond spice. I don't drink it often, but when I do, I mean it.
Off on some arcane errands shortly. I'll return in time for dinner, I promise.
High: A pleasant day to be alive, my dear. Care to join me a while before your work?
Good morning. I spotted a rare bird over the farm — flown in from the Fern Islands, I suspect. The valley brings me such small wonders. As do you.
Morning. I brewed something restorative. ...For you. Don't read too much into it. ...Read a little into it.
Don't work too hard today. I'd rather not have to levitate you home. ...Though I would, gladly.
VeryHigh: Good morning, my dearest. Call me Magnus — 'the Wizard' was always armor, and you slipped beneath it long ago.
I have lived many lonely years among my spells, my love. You walked in and made the silence beautiful. Good morning.
Morning. I've gazed into the abyss and across the stars, and found nothing half so wondrous as waking beside you.
Come, let me hold you before the day parts us. Even a sorcerer cannot conjure a feeling finer than this one.

Happy: Good morning, my dear. The currents of magic run bright today — and my spirits with them. You have that effect.
Morning! The cosmos and I are, for once, in full agreement: today shall be splendid.
A fine morning. My work flows, the aether sings, and you are here. The rare and perfect trifecta of a content sorcerer.
Neutral: Morning. I'm running low on potion supplies — I'll head into the woods soon. Mushrooms, mostly. Riveting, I know.
There's coffee steeping by an old recipe of mine. It will either soothe you or grant visions. Likely both.
The trees were singing of new growth this morning. ...Yes, the trees sing. You'd hear them too, if you listened.
Grumpy: Morning. A failed incantation has soured my mood. Keep your distance — for both our sakes.
...The aether grates on me today. I'm poor company. Forgive the gloom, my dear.
Don't mind me. Even wizards have mornings the magic simply refuses to cooperate.

Arguments.Intro: You called my craft 'parlor tricks' again. I have reshaped the fabric of reality, my dear, and you ask if I might 'pull a coin from your ear.'
Arguments.GoodChoice: Your magic is wondrous. Teach me to see it as you do.
Arguments.GoodReply: ...You truly wish to understand? Then sit. Few have ever cared to. ...Thank you, my dear.
Arguments.NeutralChoice: I didn't mean to belittle it.
Arguments.NeutralReply: Perhaps not. But power long unrespected grows weary. Mind that.
Arguments.BadReply: Superstition. I'll recall that the next time the void comes knocking. ...Leave me a while.

Arguments.Intro: You vanish into that farm and leave me to my echoing tower. I severed a great many ties to be here. Don't make me regret them.
Arguments.GoodChoice: I'm sorry. Tonight the tower won't be empty — I'll be in it, with you.
Arguments.GoodReply: ...Good. The silence is far easier to bear when you're breaking it. Don't be late, my dear.
Arguments.NeutralChoice: I've been busy with the harvest.
Arguments.NeutralReply: The harvest. Of course. Even sorcerers lose to turnips, it seems.
Arguments.BadReply: I chose YOU over solitude. Do not confuse the two. ...Leave me.

Anniversary.Reminder: My dearest,^The stars have completed their circuit: today marks a year of our union. Do not let it pass unmarked, lest I sulk most magnificently.^- M.
Anniversary.Sweet: You remembered. After so long being feared, and forgotten... to be REMEMBERED, by you — it undoes me entirely. Come here, my love.
Anniversary.Disappointed: You forgot our anniversary. I have outlived empires; I shall outlive this slight. ...Though it wounds more than I will admit.

Lines: I'm told you bestowed a gift upon another. I am not a jealous man. ...I am, however, a powerful one. Do mind that, my dear.
A gift, for someone else? The aether trembled at my displeasure. ...Be gentle with my heart, would you.

Makeup.Hint: If you would mend this rift — bring me something from the wild, or the deep. Something raw with natural power. That, I would accept.
Makeup.Reconcile: Ah — something drawn from the earth's own magic. You understand me better than most, my dear. The rift is mended. Come closer.
Makeup.Resigned: The offering never came. So be it. I have endured longer silences than this. The matter is... released.

Loot.JackpotReaction: Extraordinary. This shard hums with an energy even I cannot name — and I have named a great many. The void itself seems to covet it. Take it; such power is safer in your hands than mine.
